normalized_text:
Hybrid Work and Travel Expense Policy
Hybrid Attendance
- Employees assigned to hybrid roles are expected to work from the office at least 3 business days each week unless an approved exception is on file.
- Team leads may set anchor days for in-office collaboration.
- Exceptions for medical, caregiving, or temporary business reasons require manager approval and, when applicable, HR documentation.

Travel Approval
- Domestic business travel requires manager approval before booking.
- International travel requires manager approval and budget confirmation from the cost-center owner.
- Travel should use approved booking channels whenever available.

Expense Reimbursement Limits
- Airfare should be economy class unless an approved exception applies.
- Hotel reimbursement should stay within the corporate travel rate for the destination.
- Meal reimbursement is limited to 85 USD per travel day unless local policy states a lower cap.
- Expense reports should be submitted within 30 days of travel completion.
